prompt: The music feels repetitive. Add variation in the second verse — change up the melody slightly.

args.content:
ch 1 Melody
  plugin mini
  strip console1

ch 2 Bass
  plugin bass
  strip console1

ch 3 Chords
  plugin jup8
  strip console1

ch 4 Kick
  plugin kick

ch 5 Snare
  plugin drums

ch 6 HiHat
  plugin drums

arr verse 4 chorus 4 verse_2 4

sec verse

    p q q q q
    n 60 62 64 65

  ch 2 Bass
    p q _q q _q
    n 36

    n 48 52 55

judgment.relevance_reason: The AI correctly created a second verse section and applied rhythmic and melodic variations to the melody track as requested.
